case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ZELAYA ARMANDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA ARMANDO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZELAYA ARMANDO $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $664.00, $200. ON OR BEFORE 6/12 BALANCE DUE BY 8/15/91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO PLTF.RETURNED.
